value: {"schema_version": "1.2", "game_metadata": {"id": "sma10_fisika_fluida_statis_wordgame_001", "title": "Fluida Statis Word Challenge", "subject": "Fisika", "grade_level": "SMA-10", "chapter": "Fluida", "sub_chapter": "Fluida Statis", "game_type": "word_game", "estimated_duration_minutes": 15, "learning_objectives": ["Memahami konsep tekanan hidrostatik", "Mengenal prinsip Pascal dalam fluida", "Mengerti hukum Archimedes", "Mengidentifikasi besaran-besaran dalam fluida statis"]}, "game_content": {"instructions": "Tebak kata kunci yang berkaitan dengan fluida statis.
